## Required docs consistency checks

<!-- Which files must stay in agreement after this change. Default set: -->

- [ ] `SKILL.md` loop still reads coherently
- [ ] `references/task-classes.md` remains the canonical routing matrix (no second source of truth introduced)

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Markdown renders correctly on GitHub (all fences closed; four-backtick outers around nested fences).
- [ ] No existing safety guidance removed or weakened.
- [ ] No section gives the body final decision authority; sensitive work stays with the brain.
- [ ] Diff touches only the target files.
